analysis.mistake:
Address field displayed literal '
' text instead of rendering line breaks
analysis.expected:
RichText editor content with
tags should render as actual line breaks on the frontend
analysis.rootCause: Inconsistent escaping function: esc_html() was used on address field (line 59) while the same file already used wp_kses_post() for hoursContent (line 76) and contactContent (line 86). The developer didn't notice or follow the existing pattern in the same file.

suggestions.content:
RichText editor content (with potential HTML tags like
, , etc.) must use wp_kses_post() for output, never esc_html(). Use esc_html() only for plain text fields (text inputs, metadata without HTML support).
suggestions.rationale: The Footer block already follows this pattern correctly for hoursContent and contactContent. Documenting this prevents developers from mixing escaping functions for similar content types in the same block.
